name: Saddar
description: The historic commercial heart of Peshawar. Excellent foot traffic but high congestion.

name: Hayatabad
description: Planned suburb with modern amenities. Great for family-oriented businesses and high-end cafes.

name: University Town
description: Upscale area near universities. Perfect for premium brands

name: Karkhano Market
description: Famous for imported goods and wholesale. Best for bulk retail and bargain businesses.

name: Ring Road
description: Expanding highway area. Ideal for large spaces

name: Board Bazaar
description: Bustling local market near educational institutes. Good for affordable food and daily needs.

name: Gulbahar
description: Established residential-commercial area. Good for localized retail and family businesses.
